/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/tests/test_splitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/elf_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/elf_splitter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/segment_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/offset_calculator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/stub_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_splitter.dir/src/stub_injector.cpp.o -o test_splitter
